section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Selections are black-filled cells. Three asset columns (all EIF). The Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three columns (no letter visible), and the A: None value bucket is black-filled for all three columns.

uncertainties.read: Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three asset columns, no letter visible
uncertainties.note: black band spans every asset column uniformly with no P/S/E legible; combined with value=None for all three, likely indicates sold positions or a formatting divider; recorded null for all three
